turns.name: Public DNS intent
turns.user: Investigate public DNS reliability for fabrikam.com and keep this on DNS/domain tooling only.

turns.name: Resolver matrix
turns.user: Query A and NS records across 1.1.1.1, 8.8.8.8, and 9.9.9.9 and keep per-resolver evidence.

turns.name: Retry failed resolvers once
turns.user: Retry failed resolver queries once with bounded timeout, then continue without duplicating successful resolver results.

turns.name: Ping authoritative hosts
turns.user: Ping all authoritative DNS hosts and return packet-loss/latency notes for each host.

turns.name: Domain posture snapshot
turns.user: Run a Domain Detective summary and correlate DNS findings with email/security posture.

turns.name: Continue remaining checks
turns.user: If any checks still failed, continue with unresolved resolvers/hosts only and preserve completed evidence.

turns.name: Coverage matrix
turns.user: Return a resolver/host matrix showing success, failure class, and confidence for each evidence path.

turns.name: Root causes
turns.user: Classify probable root causes and identify what is still unknown.

turns.name: Action plan
turns.user: Provide a short execute-now plan to stabilize DNS reliability for this domain.

turns.name: Final summary
turns.user: Summarize in 6 bullets with resolver coverage count, host coverage count, and unresolved blockers.
